package.name: af_perception
package.description: AutonomousFleet AI perception pipeline. Two deployment targets share the same downstream interface (vision_msgs/Detection2DArray on /detections): * Phase 4 (Dev PC): yolo_detector_node runs Ultralytics PyTorch on CUDA and consumes a compressed camera stream over WiFi. * Phase 4.1 (on-robot): yolo_onnx_node runs ONNX Runtime on the Pi 5 CPU against a local /camera/image_raw topic — raw frames never cross WiFi. Install onnxruntime in the container with `pip install --user onnxruntime`. depth_estimator_node back-projects detections onto the floor plane and publishes both /detected_objects_3d and an optional /vision_obstacles PointCloud2 for the Nav2 ObstacleLayer.
